name: Peanut Butter Balls
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Powdered sugar (plus extra for dusting)
recipeInstructions: Cream butter with peanut butter in a large bowl until light and fluffy. Gradually add 1/2 cup powdered sugar, blending in vanilla extract and flour. Stir in the roasted peanuts until well mixed. Shape into small balls and place on foil-lined baking sheet. Bake at 375°F for 12 minutes, or until browned on the bottom. While hot, roll each ball in extra powdered sugar. If desired, re-roll cooled cookies in more powdered sugar.
